name: RStudio Codespace
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R rstudio:rstudio /home/rstudio/project && sudo chown -R rstudio:rstudio /home/rstudio/.config/rstudio && sudo chown -R rstudio:rstudio /home/rstudio/.Rprofile && sudo chmod a+rx /workspaces && ln -sf /workspaces /home/rstudio/workspaces && for repo in /workspaces/*/; do ln -sf "$repo" "/home/rstudio/$(basename $repo)" 2>/dev/null || true; done && ([ ! -f /home/rstudio/.config/rstudio/rstudio-prefs.json ] && cp /home/rstudio/project/core/rstudio-settings/rstudio-prefs.json /home/rstudio/.config/rstudio/ || true) && ([ -d /home/rstudio/project/core/rstudio-settings/themes ] && cp -n /home/rstudio/project/core/rstudio-settings/themes/* /home/rstudio/.config/rstudio/themes/ || true)
